# Hi 👋, I'm Mayank Dhiman
**A passionate Data Analyst | Excel Automation & Dashboard Expert | Turning Raw Sales Data into Actionable Insights | Power Query & VBA Pro | Cuts Reporting Time by 30% with Interactive MIS Dashboards**


- 🔭 **I’m currently working on:** "I'm currently working on: Building automated reporting solutions to help businesses save time and improve data accuracy."
- 🌱 **I’m currently learning:** Power BI
- -- 📫 **How to reach me:** Mayankdhiman443@gmail.com
- 😄 **Pronouns:** Bunty
- ⚡ **Fun fact:** I Love Tech and Tech Love Me
